case_title: WHITNEY R. WHITNEY,PH.D. VS. SPRINGS INDUSTRIES,INC., et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-19-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

INJUNCTIVE RELIEF, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITNEY,PH.D., WHITNEY R. AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINGS INDUSTRIES,INC. DOES 1 THROUGH 150,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-05-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-30-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-20-2006

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-19-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-05-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT PARTY SERVED: CRANDALL C. BOWLES, CEO FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITNEY,PH.D., WHITNEY R. SERVED DEC-01-2005, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE DEC-07-2005 AS TO DEFENDANT SPRINGS INDUSTRIES,INC.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
